description: A designed dark-navy graphic titled 'Enforcement Update' with the date 'January 23, 2025', topped by the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement seal and name. It presents two large white figures: '538 Arrests' and '373 Detainers Lodged'. There is no photograph; it is a text-and-seal data card.
notable_text: Enforcement Update; January 23, 2025; 538 Arrests; 373 Detainers Lodged
